{{Quote|Depird's brother, unlike Depird, was one of the few pilots who really knew how to handle a blastsword. Almost a pity that he died of his injuries.|Cheriss ke Hanadi to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="X-Wing: SOA" />}}
'''Jeapird ke Fanax''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Adumari]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[blastsword]] duelist from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]. He fought in the finals of the [[Cartann Ground Championship]] against [[Cheriss ke Hanadi]] to whom he ultimately lost. Jeapird [[Death/Legends|died]] of his injuries from the said match, which prompted his brother [[Depird ke Fanax]] to avenge him. Depird challenged ke Hanadi to a duel in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]] and also lost.<ref name="X-Wing: SOA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1stm}}
